export default "# Knowledge Base Documents\n\nThis directory contains persistent documents that the AI assistant can reference when answering questions and drafting solutions.\n\n## Document Categories\n\n### Federal Acquisition Regulations (FAR)\n- Add FAR guidance documents here\n\n### Templates\n- Statement of Objectives (SOO)\n- Performance Work Statement (PWS)\n- Quality Assurance Surveillance Plan (QASP)\n- Security and Privacy Plans (SSP)\n- Evaluation criteria templates\n\n### Agency Playbooks\n- Leading Agile Acquisitions\n- TechFAR Hub guidance\n- Agency-specific handbooks\n\n### Best Practices\n- Modular contracting guides\n- Agile acquisition case studies\n- Market research templates\n\n## Adding Documents\n\n1. Place files in this directory or create subdirectories\n2. Supported formats: .txt, .md, .pdf, .docx\n3. Commit and push to make them available to all users\n\n## Loading into the App\n\nThe app will automatically load these files at startup from the repository.\n"
